easy.title: Location Display Dashboard
easy.description:
Create a page that displays the user's current location coordinates with accuracy information, timestamp, and a visual indicator of signal quality based on accuracy.

Hints: Use getCurrentPosition with both success and error callbacks, Check 'geolocation' in navigator before using the API, Format accuracy display with CSS classes for color coding

Validation: Location displayed with coordinates, accuracy color-coding, timestamp, and error handling works.
easy.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Location Display Dashboard</title>
  <style>
    body { font-family: system-ui; padding: 20px; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <!-- TODO: Implement Location Display Dashboard -->
</body>
</html>

medium.title: Distance Tracker
medium.description:
Build a page that tracks the user's movement using watchPosition, calculates total distance traveled, current speed, and shows a live log of position updates.

Hints: Use Haversine formula to calculate distance between consecutive points, Accumulate distance in a variable, reset on Start, Filter out low-accuracy positions before adding to distance, Speed = distance / time between updates

Validation: Tracking starts/stops correctly, speed shows accurate values, distance accumulates, log updates in real-time.

hard.title: Geofencing Alert System
hard.description:
Build a geofencing system where users define circular zones on a coordinate grid. When the device enters or exits a geofence, an alert is triggered.

Hints: Enter triggered when distance to center < radius, Exit triggered when distance crosses from < radius to > radius, Track previous state per fence to detect transitions, Use Haversine distance calculation

Validation: Geofences definable, enter/exit events detected, logged, and visually indicated correctly.
